meaning: adj.尖锐的,苛刻的,鲜明的,乱砍的
examples: He paints with harsh, slashing brushstrokes.
The president has chosen to kick-start the economy by slashing interest rates.
We need to look at ways of cutting the working week without slashing living standards.
Credit its relentless price-slashing and its build-to-order business model, which keeps inventories low.
With the economy ailing, companies are seeking to cut costs by slashing retirement benefits.
